EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} removed vNIC profile "{object.name}" from network "{datafield8}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create vNIC profile "{object.name}" in network "{datafield8}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove vNIC profile "{object.name}" from network "{datafield8}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created vNIC profile "{object.name}" in network "{datafield8}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change vNIC profile "{object.name}" in network "{datafield8}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed vNIC profile "{object.name}" in network "{datafield8}" on host {event_src.host}
